title: erigeron oxyodontus
intro: Erigeron oxyodontus, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Erigeron oxyodontus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, calm respiratory problems, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used as teas, tinctures, or applied topically as a poultice.
